# Executive Briefing Template

Copy this template into the relevant project note or working draft. Replace placeholders with repository-backed facts or user-provided context. Leave unknown values blank or mark them as `Unknown`; do not invent them.

```markdown
# Executive Briefing — <Project / Topic>

## Purpose

## Executive summary

## Current status

## Material changes since last update

## Key risks or trade-offs

## Decisions / asks

| Ask / decision | Why it matters | Needed by | Owner / approver |
|---|---|---|---|
|  |  |  |  |

## Recommended message

## Assumptions / missing inputs
```
